The '''''Vehemence''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served as part of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ''Vehemence'' was in the [[Eriadu system/Legends|Eriadu system]] to rendezvous with [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and take him on an inspection of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] when his [[Epsilon 5 (Galactic Empire)|shuttle]] came under [[Liberation of Gial Ackbar|attack]] from [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces. The ''Vehemence'' launched [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], but they were held off by Rebel [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] until the Rebels completed the boarding of Tarkin's shuttle. Tarkin, however was not aboard, having escaped shortly before the Rebels arrived, but the Rebels were able to rescue Tarkin's [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] slave, [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]].

The Rebel Alliance would later use a recreation of the mission as a training simulation for new pilots.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
